evals.prompt: Show me the current code quality issues for the main branch of this repository on Codacy.
evals.expected_output: Auto-detect repository parameters from git remote and fetch issues with structured output.

evals.prompt: Trigger a reanalysis of the latest PR and wait for the results to see if our changes improved the issue count.
evals.expected_output: Use --reanalyze-and-wait to trigger reanalysis, poll for completion, and report issue deltas.
assertions: Reports delta by pattern and severity

evals.prompt: I need to check which analysis tools are enabled for this repository and disable the Semgrep tool.
evals.expected_output: List current tools, verify Semgrep is enabled, then disable it and trigger reanalysis for changes to take effect.
assertions: Mentions reanalysis is required for config changes
